Tests the Math.atan function with Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY to verify it returns Math.PI / 2.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan` function in JavaScript. It checks that the arctangent of `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` returns the expected value of `Math.PI / 2`. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing specifically on the mathematical correctness of the `Math.atan` function when handling positive infinity. The assertion ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly implements this aspect of the ECMAScript specification.
